title: lasianthus sumatraensis
intro: Lasianthus sumatraensis, also known as Sumatran lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lasianthus sumatraensis include its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, Lasianthus sumatraensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
